replies.msg:
好多學科名都係-logy
biology, methodology, phenomenology等等
但又有一啲係-ic(s)
music, mathematics, physics, economics, tactics(?)等等
點解唔叫physology, economology?
另外-try尾又係咩事
chemistry, history(?)呢啲
點解唔叫chemistics, histology?
